set.name: LORT-BTB
set.longname: Legends Of Runeterra Conversion: Beyond the Bandlewood

card.name: Pantheon, The Spear of Targon
card.text: Trample, Fated (The first time each turn this creature is targeted by a source you control, it gets a +1/+1 counter.) Pantheon enters with a shield counter. Each time a source you control targets a creature you control, put a Atreus counter on Pantheon. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Pantheon has five or more Atreus counters, remove all Atreus counters from Pantheon, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Pantheon, The Aspect of War

card.name: Pantheon, The Aspect of War
card.text: Trample, Fated (The first time each turn this creature is targeted by a source you control, it gets a +1/+1 counter.) Whenever a source you control targets a creature you control, choose one that Pantheon doesn't have from among first strike, flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, and vigilance. Pantheon gets the chosen ability. --- (Front): Pantheon, The Spear of Targon

card.name: We Stand Together
card.text: Two target creatures you control get +1/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Camphor, the Doubt
card.text: When Camphor enters, if four or more creatures you control have been targeted by sources you control this turn, Camphor gets Trample, Challenger, and a spellshield counter. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature. The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Saga Seeker
card.text: Fated (The first time each turn this creature is targeted by a source you control, it gets a +1/+1 counter.)

card.name: Wounded Whiteflame
card.text: Fury, Fated (When this creature destroys another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it. The first time each turn this creature is targeted by a source you control, it gets a +1/+1 counter.)

card.name: Shield Vault
card.text: Target creature you control gets a +1/+1 counter. Target creature an opponent controls gets a stun counter.

card.name: Battle Bonds
card.text: Two target creatures you control get two +1/+1 counters.

card.name: Blinded Mystic
card.text: When Blinded Mystic enters, up to one target creature you control gets a +1/+1 counter and up to one target creature an opponent controls loses all abilities.

card.name: Against the Odds
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) This spell can only be cast if an opponent has more creatures then you. Target creature you control gets a +1/+1 counter for each creature target opponent controls.

card.name: Freed Colossus
card.text: Whenever Freed Colossus enters or attacks, create a Gem token.

card.name: Iula, The Scorned
card.text: When Iula enters, choose one — • Target creature you control gets Trample. • Target creature you control gets a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Celestial Wonder
card.text: Tap two target creatures, then put a stun counter on them.

card.name: Waste Walker
card.text: Trample Whenever a landmark you control is destroyed or sacrificed, Waste Walker gets a +1/+1 counter.

card.name: Obelisk of Power
card.text: Vanishing 3 When Obelisk of Power enters or is destroyed or sacrificed, the creature with the highest power among creatures you control gets +2/+0.

card.name: Unleashed Energy
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets +2/+1 until the start of your next turn. • Destroy target landmark you control. Target creature you control gets +4/+2 until the start of your next turn.

card.name: Rite of the Arcane
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card sacrifice a landmark or untapped land you control. Rite of the Arcane deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Endless Devout
card.text: Whenever Endless Devout is destroyed, if it would be put into your graveyard, transform it instead. --- (Back): Endless Sarcophagus

card.name: Endless Sarcophagus
card.text: Vanishing 3 When Endless Sarcophagus is destroyed or sacrificed, create a Restored Devout token. --- (Front): Endless Devout

card.name: Risen Altar
card.text: Vanishing 3 When Risen Altar is destroyed or sacrificed, create a Dami'yin the Unbound token.

card.name: Sandseer
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever Sandseer enters, draw a card. If the card drawn this way is a landmark, reveal it and repeat this process.

card.name: Ruinous Acolyte
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Ruinous Acolyte enters, you may sacrifice a landmark you control to give each creature you control named Ruinous Acolyte a +1/+1 counter.

card.name: Herald of the Magus
card.text: When Herald of the Magus enters, if there are four or more landmarks in your graveyard, it gets the ability "Legendary creatures you control have +2/+2 and Trample."

card.name: Servitude of Desolation
card.text: Exile all nonland permanents that entered your graveyard this turn. At the beginning of your next upkeep, put each permanent exiled this way onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Construct of Desolation
card.text: Choose one — • Create a Ruinous Acolyte token. • Create an Obelisk of Power token.

card.name: Desert Duel
card.text: Target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-0. Then target creature you control and target creature an opponent controls fight. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Xerath, Archmage
card.text: Rite of the Arcane — Whenever you or a source you control destroys or sacrifices a landmark you control, Xerath deals 1 damage to the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control. Whenever a landmark you control is destroyed or sacrificed, put an Arcane counter on Xerath. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Xerath has four or more Arcane counters, remote all arcane counters from Xerath, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Xerath, The Magus Ascendant

prop.type: Legendary Artifact Creature — Construct Wizard Demigod

card.name: Xerath, The Magus Ascendant
card.text: Rite of the Arcane — Whenever you or a source you control destroys or sacrifices a landmark you control, Xerath deals 3 damage to the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control. If you control an enchantment card named Restored Sun Disk, this ability deals 5 damage instead. Ascended God-Warrior — If you control an enchantment card named Restored Sun Disk, at the beginning of your upkeep, Xerath deals 5 damage to the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control, and Xerath has "Whenever a creature an opponent controls would enter the graveyard, it is exiled instead." --- (Front): Xerath, Archmage

prop.type: Legendary Artifact Creature — Construct Wizard Demigod

card.name: Piercing Darkness
card.text: Piercing Darkness deals 5 damage to target creature, you gain that much life.

card.name: Watcher on the Isles
card.text: The first time each turn an instant or sorcery you control destroys a creature an opponent controls, Watcher on the Isles deals 2 damage to that creatures controller.

card.name: Ixtali Sentinel
card.text: Lifelink When Ixtali Sentinel enters, create a Darkness token if you don't have one. Until the end of turn, the next time you activate the ability of a Darkness you control targeting a creature an opponent controls, copy it targeting that creatures controller.

card.name: Dess and Ada
card.text: When Dess and Ada enters, create a Darkness token if you don't have one except it has "{0}: Sacrifice Darkness. Darkness deals 2 to each creature target opponent controls. Activate only as a sorcery."

card.name: Burgeoning Sentinel
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) The first time an instant, sorcery, or activated ability you control destroys a creature an opponent controls, Burgeoning Sentinel gets +2/+1.

card.name: Solari Sentinel
card.text: When Solari Sentinel enters, create a Darkness token if you don't have one.

card.name: Mistkeepers
card.text: The first time each turn an instant or sorcery you control destroys a creature an opponent controls, create a Mistwraith token except it has Ephemeral. (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Catalogue of Regrets
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create an exiled copy of an instant or sorcery from your graveyard that was cast on your last turn. Until the end of turn, you may cast that copy from exile.

card.name: Buhru Sentinel
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) The first time an instant, sorcery, or activated ability you control destroys a creature an opponent controls, Buhru Sentinel gets +2/+1.

card.name: Piercing Darkness
card.text: Destroy target creature. Until the end of turn, creatures opponents control have -2/-0.

card.name: Insider Knowledge
card.text: Each player draws 2 cards.

card.name: Officer Squad
card.text: When Officer Squad enters, target player reveals their hand, then discards the card with the lowest mana value from among them to draw 3 cards.

card.name: Station Archivist
card.text: When Station Archivist enters, reveal the top five cards of your library, then choose up to one instant or sorcery from among them and create an exiled copy of it. Shuffle all cards revealed this way into your library. Until the end of the turn, you may cast the copy from exile.

card.name: Coup de Grace
card.text: Shuffle target creature into their owners library, then that creatures owner draws a card.

card.name: Sump Fumes
card.text: Sump Fumes deals 2 damage to target creature. If you've drawn two or more cards this turn, Sump Fumes deals 3 damage instead.

card.name: Most Wanted
card.text: Target player reveals their hand, then discards the card with the lowest mana value from among them to draw 3 cards.

card.name: Enforcers Ambush
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. If you have drawn two or more cards this turn, target creature gets +2/+0 and shadow until end of turn instead.

card.name: The Forge Of Tomorrow
card.text: When The Forge Of Tomorrow enters, create a Forge Worker token. The first time you cast a spell with mana value 6 or greater, sacrifice The Forge Of Tomorrow and untap all lands you control.

card.name: Ferros Financier
card.text: When Ferros Financier enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery with mana value 6 or greater, put that card into your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Forge Chief
card.text: Whenever Forge Chief deals combat damage, untap target land you control.

card.name: Assembly Line
card.text: Create two Forge Worker tokens.

card.name: Shock Blast
card.text: Shock Blast deals 3 damage to any target, then deals 3 damage to any other target.

card.name: Ferros Skycruiser
card.text: Flying The first time you cast a spell with mana value 6 or greater, Ferros Skycruiser gets +2/+0.

card.name: Hextech Handler
card.text: The first time you cast a spell with mana value 6 or greater, Hextech Handler gets "Artifact creatures you control get +1/+0."

card.name: Hextech Anomaly
card.text: At the beginning of your pre-combat main phase, reveal the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery with mana value 6 or greater, create an exiled copy of it. Shuffle all cards revealed this way into your library. Until the end of turn, you may sacrifice Hextech Anomaly to cast that copy from exile without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Albus Ferros
card.text: First strike When Albus Ferros enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Jayce Talis, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. Whenever Albus Ferros attacks, Albus Ferros deals X+3 damage to target opponent, where X equals the number of spells you have cast this turn with mana value 6 or greater.

card.name: Stinky Whump
card.text: When Stinky Whump enters, create two Puffcap tokens. Whenever a source an opponent controls destroys Stinky Whump, that opponent creates two Stinky Whump tokens.

card.name: Rocket Barrage
card.text: Rocket Barrage deals 4 damage to target creature, then deals 1 damage to each other creature that creatures controller controls.

card.name: Flashbomb LORT-BTB
card.text: When this token is sacrificed, Flashbomb deals 1 damage to a random creature you control. (Choose a random target for each token sacrificed.) (If you would draw a card while you control one or more Flashbomb tokens, flip a coin. If you win the flip, draw the card. If you lose the flip, reveal the card as you draw it, then sacrifice Flashbomb tokens equal to its mana value.)

card.name: Caitlyn, Piltover's Finest
card.text: First strike Whenever Caitlyn deals combat damage, target opponent creates two Flashbomb tokens. At the end of any phase on your turn, if an opponent has five or more Flashbomb tokens, transform Caitlyn. Partner --- (Back): Caitlyn, The Sheriff of Piltover

card.name: Caitlyn, The Sheriff of Piltover
card.text: First strike Whenever Caitlyn deals combat damage, target opponent creates four Flashbomb tokens. Then Caitlyn deals X damage to that opponent where X is the number of Flashbomb tokens they control. --- (Front): Caitlyn, Piltover's Finest

card.name: Sting Officer
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Whenever Sting Officer deals damage to an opponent, that opponent creates two Flashbomb tokens.

card.name: Advanced Intel
card.text: Target opponent creates two Flashbomb tokens. Draw a card.

card.name: Piltover Peacemaker
card.text: Piltover Peacemaker deals 2 damage to target creature. That creatures controller creates two Flashbomb tokens.

card.name: Corina, Mastermind
card.text: When Corina enters, choose one — • Target opponent creates five Flashbomb tokens. • Target opponent sacrifices all Flashbomb and Puffcap tokens they control.

card.name: Justice Rider
card.text: Whenever an opponent draws a card, that opponent creates a Flashbomb token.

card.name: Jayce Talis
card.text: When Jayce Talis enters, choose one — • Jayce Talis gets First strike. • Jayce Talis gets Challenger. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery with mana value 6 or greater, put a Progress counter on Jayce Talis. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Jayce Talis has two or more Progress counters, remote all Progress counters from Jayce Talis, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Jayce, The Defender of Tomorrow

card.name: Jayce, The Defender of Tomorrow
card.text: First strike, Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) When Jayce transforms, create a tapped Acceleration Gate token. The first time each turn you cast an instant or sorcery with mana value 6 or greater, copy it targeting the same targets. --- (Front): Jayce Talis

card.name: Acceleration Gate LORT-BTB
card.text: {T}: Sacrifice Acceleration Gate. Until the end of turn, creatures you control get +2/+0 and First strike. Creatures you control with First strike get +2/+0 and Double strike until end of turn instead.

card.name: Sion, Resurrected
card.text: Trample If Sion is discarded, or is put into the graveyard from the library, the creature with the highest power among creatures you control gets Trample. Whenever you discard a card, Sion gets +1/+0 until end of turn. At the start of any phase on your turn, if there is 35 or greater total power among creatures you control on the battlefield and in your graveyard, transform Sion. Partner --- (Back): Sion, The Undead Juggernaut

card.name: Sion, The Undead Juggernaut
card.text: Trample Whenever Sion is destroyed, create a Sion Returned token. --- (Front): Sion, Resurrected

card.name: Sion Returned LORT-BTB
card.text: Trample, Ephemeral (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) When Sion Returned enters, if it's your turn, untap all creatures you control, after this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Noble Rebel
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) Whenever you discard a card, put a charge counter on Noble Rebel. While Noble Rebel has three or more charge counter, Noble Rebel has +2/+1.

card.name: Salt And Stitches
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Create a Reborn Grenadier token with +2/+0.

card.name: Grave Physician
card.text: When Grave Physician enters, you may discard a card, if you do, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature, put it into your hand, then shuffle all other cards into the library.

card.name: Ancient Warmonger
card.text: Trample If Ancient Warmonger is discarded, or is put into the graveyard from the library, the creature with the highest power among creatures you control gets +2/+0.

card.name: Reborn Grenadier
card.text: Ephemeral (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. If Reborn Grenadier is discarded, or is put into the graveyard from the library, create a Reborn Grenadier token.

card.name: Lost Soul
card.text: Kicker {2}{R}{R} (You may pay an additional {2}{R}{R} as you cast this spell.) If this spell was kicked, create a Twinblade Revenant token. If Lost Soul is discarded, or is put into the graveyard from the library, create a Twinblade Revenant token.

card.name: Twinblade Revenant LORT-BTB
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Twinblade Revenant is destroyed, you may pay {2}{R}{R}, if you do, you may search your graveyard for a card named Lost Soul, reveal it, and put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Roar of the Slayer
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Destroy the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control.

card.name: Fallen Rider
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) If Fallen Rider is discarded, or is put into the graveyard from the library, create a Risen Rider token.

card.name: Risen Rider LORT-BTB
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)

card.name: Weapons of the Lost
card.text: Weapons of the Lost deals 3 damage to target creature. Create a Trifarian Shieldbreaker token.

card.name: Fallen Reckoner
card.text: Trample When Fallen Reckoner enters, the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control gets "This creature can't block". When Fallen Reckoner is destroyed, create a Risen Reckoner token.

card.name: Risen Reckoner LORT-BTB
card.text: Trample, Ephemeral (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) When Risen Reckoner enters, the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control gets "This creature can't block".

card.name: The Lady of Blood
card.text: Whenever a creature you control without Ephemeral is destroyed, create an exiled copy of it. You may cast that copy from exile for as long as it remains exiled. Creatures cast from exile this way enter with Ephemeral. (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: For Glory!
card.text: If you have Reputation: For Glory! costs {3} less to cast. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, you gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters) Create two Trifarian Gloryseekers tokens.

card.name: Memory's Cloak
card.text: Counter target instant, sorcery, or activated ability targeting a creature you control.

card.name: Pathless Ancient
card.text: Pathless Ancient costs {2} less to cast for each creature recalled by a source you control this turn. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Liminal Guardian
card.text: When Liminal Guardian enters, reveal from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with mana value 1 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other cards revealed this way into the library. --- (Back): Nine Lives

card.name: Nine Lives
card.text: Create a Liminal Guardian token. --- (Front): Liminal Guardian

card.name: Sai'nen, Thousand-Tailed
card.text: When Sai'nen enters, draw two cards, then each creature you control gets +1/+1 until the start of your next turn.

card.name: Windsinger
card.text: Flying When Windsinger enters, recall a creature. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: God-Willow Seedling
card.text: Vanishing 3 When God-Willow Seedling enters, recall target creature you control, then create a token copy of that creature except it has Ephemeral. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.) When God-Willow Seedling is sacrificed with no time counters, create another token copy of that creature with Ephemeral. (That creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Charm
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) Recall a creature you control to give target creature an opponent controls Vulnerable until the start of your next turn. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield. When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Children of the Forest
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) +{U} — Recall target creature you control. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.) +{3}{U} — Create a token copy of each creature a source you control recalled this turn. These tokens enter with Ephemeral. (That creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Tail-Cloak Matriarch
card.text: The first time each turn you recall a creature you control, create an exact token copy of it, except it has Ephemeral. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield. This creature can attack and T as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: The Mourned
card.text: Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) Whenever The Mourned deals combat damage to an opponent, recall The Mourned. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Ahri, The Nine-Tailed Fox
card.text: First strike At the start of combat on your turn, you may recall a nontoken creature you control other than Ahri, if you do, Ahri can only be blocked by one creature until end of turn. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.) Whenever a creature you control is recalled by a source you control, put a Vesani counter on Ahri. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Ahri has five or more Vesani counters, remove all Vesani counters from Ahri, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Ahri, The Gatekeeper

card.name: Ahri, The Gatekeeper
card.text: First strike, Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) At the start of combat on your turn, you may recall a nontoken creature you control other than Ahri, if you do, Ahri can't be blocked until end of turn. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.) --- (Front): Ahri, The Nine-Tailed Fox

card.name: Murkwolf Shaman
card.text: Juggernaut (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.) At the beginning of your end phase, if Murkwolf Shaman dealt combat damage to an opponent, transform it and draw a card. --- (Back): Murkwolf Rager

card.name: Murkwolf Rager
card.text: Juggernaut (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.) --- (Front): Murkwolf Shaman

card.name: Mammoth Shaman
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your end phase, if Mammoth Shaman dealt combat damage to an opponent, transform it. --- (Back): Mammoth Rager

card.name: Mammoth Rager
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your upkeep, put two +1/+1 counters on Mammoth Rager. --- (Front): Mammoth Shaman

card.name: Vulpine Wanderer
card.text: When Vulpine Wanderer enters, choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+0 and Trample. • Target creature gets two +1/+1 counters. • Choose a creature you control. Vulpine Wanderer deals 1 damage to all players and all creatures not chosen this way. • Target creature gets +0/+2 and Juggernaut. (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)

card.name: Bone Scryer
card.text: Whenever Bone Scryer is dealt damage, Bone Scryer deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Tusk Speaker
card.text: Trample When Tusk Speaker enters, Tusk Speaker deals 1 damage to each player.

card.name: Hyara Allseer
card.text: When Vulpine Wanderer enters, choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+0 and Trample. • Target creature gets two +1/+1 counters. • Choose a creature you control. Hyara Allseer deals 1 damage to all players and all creatures not chosen this way. • Target creature gets +0/+2 and Juggernaut. (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)

card.name: Wrath of the Freljord
card.text: Trample When Wrath of the Freljord enters, Frostbite target creature. (A creature with frostbite gains -X/-0 where X is that creatures power until the end of the turn.) Creatures opponents control with power 3 or less can't block.

card.name: Spirits Unleashed
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Spirits Unleashed deals 1 damage to each player and each creature they control.

card.name: Shaman's Call
card.text: Choose two — choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+0 and Trample. • Target creature gets two +1/+1 counters. • Choose a creature you control. Shaman's Call deals 1 damage to all players and all creatures not chosen this way. • Target creature gets +0/+2 and Juggernaut. (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)

card.name: Inner Beast
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn, then choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+0 and Trample. • Target creature gets two +1/+1 counters. • Choose a creature you control. Inner Beast deals 1 damage to all players and all creatures not chosen this way. • Target creature gets +0/+2 and Juggernaut. (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)

card.name: Monk Udyr
card.text: When Monk Udyr enters or deals combat damage, choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+0 and Trample. • Target creature gets two +1/+1 counters. • Choose a creature you control. Monk Udyr deals 1 damage to all players and all creatures not chosen this way. • Target creature gets +0/+2 and Juggernaut. (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.) Whenever a source you control modifies a creature you control, put a Stance counter on Monk Udyr. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Monk Udyr has three or more Stance counters, remove all counters from Monk Udyr, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Udyr, The Spirit Walker

card.name: Udyr, The Spirit Walker
card.text: When Udyr enters or deals combat damage, choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+0 and Trample. • Target creature gets two +1/+1 counters. • Choose a creature you control. Udyr deals 1 damage to all players and all creatures not chosen this way. • Target creature gets +0/+2 and Juggernaut. (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.) Whenever another source you control modifies a creature you control, put a +1/+1 counter on Udyr. --- (Front): Monk Udyr

card.name: Gorlith the Unscalable
card.text: Absorb 1, Formidable (This creature assigns damage equal to its toughness rather than its power. Damage is dealt to this creature in the form of -1/-1 counters.) When Gorlith enters, exchange your life total with this creature's toughness. Gorlith can't be blocked by creatures with less toughness than Gorlith.

card.name: Durand Sculptor
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, it gets +0/+1.

card.name: Petricite Broadwing
card.text: Formidable (This creature assigns damage equal to its toughness rather than its power. Damage is dealt to this creature in the form of -1/-1 counters.) Whenever another creature you control enters, Petricite Broadwing gets Challenger until end of turn. At the beginning of your end step, transform Mega Gnar. --- (Front): Gnar, The Missing Link

card.text: Scout (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.) Whenever Yordle Ranger attacks, each other creature you control with power equal or less than Yordle Ranger gets +0/+1.

card.name: Babbling Balladeers

card.name: Curious Shellfolk

You may cast each copy from exile for as long as they remain exiled. Exiled copies created this way cost {1} less to cast. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Loping Telescope

card.name: Keeper's Verdict

card.name: The Bandle Tree
